items.title: Markets Approach New Highs on Cooling Tensions
items.description: Tech stocks reached new record highs, and the S&P 500 is currently about -1% below all-time highs.

items.title: Stocks Soar as Middle East Tensions Ease and Bond Yields Fall
items.description: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) Tuesday closed up +1.11%, the Dow Jones Industrials Index ($DOWI ) (DIA ) closed up +1.19%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) closed up +1.53%. September E-mini S&P futures (ESU25 ) are up +1.11%, and September E-mini Nasdaq futures...

items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq rally to put records back in sight
items.description: Trump said Israel has agreed a US-brokered ceasefire with Iran, boosting hopes for a more permanent end to their conflict.
